form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up previously. Resuming 8th of 10 at this track on February 23 over 1200m, 10 len behind Verdadeiro Fon with 57kg at $6. Second run from a spell won by 4.5 len at this track March 15 over 1400m defeating Qualify Boy with 57kg at $8.40. Impressive win last start and is in the mix again.

form.formComment: Comes here off a 34-day let-up. Last start scored a big 8 len win at this track March 9 over 1400m on a heavy track defeating Zhurong with 57kg at $4.20. The run before that 6th of 9 at this track on February 1 over 1400m, 13 len behind Titan Da Lagoa with 57kg at $2.60. Can measure up again.

form.formComment: Second-up. Comes off a 42-day let-up. First-up after seven months second last of 8 at this track on March 1 over 1300m, on rain affected going; 16 len behind Next Campeao carrying 57kg at $5.20. Previously second-up 3rd of 8 at Taruma on June 8 over 2000m, 5 len behind Go Camelot carrying 52kg at $5.70. Fitter and worth including.

form.formComment: Resuming after four months in the paddock. Finished off last campaign post a big 7 len win. Cidade Jardim December 20 over 1400m slow track defeating Turca Tuca carrying 56kg at $5.50. When resuming last campaign ran last of 7 at Cidade Jardim December 6 over 1000m, 13 len behind Numero Primo with 57kg at $6. Sure to be thereabouts.

form.formComment: Filly back from a spell of three months. Has placed previously first up from a break. Finished off last preparation third of 7 at this track January 11 over 1400m, 5 len behind On The End carrying 57kg at $4.30. Previously first up; third in a small field at this track December 8 over 1300m, 1.75 len behind Nice Breeze carrying 57kg at $2.70. Should be right in the finish.

form.formComment: Third-up today. First-up 3rd of 8 at this track on February 22 over 1600m, in the wet; 7 len behind Sexta Feira with 57kg at $19.90. Second-up 7th of 9 at this track on March 23 over 1500m, 7 len behind Zadig Voltaire with 56kg at $39.80. Hard to envisage a win today.

form.formComment: Resuming. Finished off last campaign eighth of 13 at this track in the G3 Octavio Dupont November 16 over 1500m, 10 len behind Tropicalia with 57kg at $10.30. At her first start won by 2 len this track August 31 over 1300m defeating Ocala City with 57kg at $3.30. Definite top-three contender.
